children.text: The Lotusia economy is denominated in the Lotus currency. Lotus combines the bes...
Lotus is issued through Proof-of-Work mining (electricity)
No arbitrary issuance cap (unlike Bitcoin), therefore no reason to hoard it
Issuance of new Lotus is adjusted to demand of the Lotusia economy
Lotus is removed from circulation through voluntary destructive use to stabilize volatility
